steps.title: Use the movement clue
steps.content: Esteban walked <u>straight</u> to his seat "without looking at the rest of us." The context describes focused movement toward one destination, not morality, cheerfulness, or honesty.

steps.title: Match the context
steps.content: Choice A means fairly or righteously, which does not describe walking. Choice C means cheerfully, but Esteban is described as sad and heavy. Choice D means honestly, which is not a physical direction. The remaining choice means without stopping or turning aside. The answer is B.
